request_payload.exposure_text: Remember when we relied on others for our security? Those days are over. Our generation has seen what happens when we depend too much on uncertain allies. Strategic autonomy isn't just about being self-reliant—it's about ensuring our safety in an unpredictable world. We've worked too hard to leave our future in others' hands. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
